items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to channel preferences for event types. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how channel preferences are captured or validated. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
